job_location: Administration centrale - Boulevard de l'Empereur 7, 1000 Bruxelles

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: stratified transformation logic with dbt, focused on maintainability, performance and profitability
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Responsibilities are dominated by rigour signals — 'maintainability', 'reliable delivery', 'data validation', 'CI/CD', 'quality' — with no velocity phrases present; the decisive phrase is 'focused on maintainability, performance and profitability'.
evidence.domain_risk: public social security institution managing unemployment, career interruption, and time credit services in Belgium
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: ONEM is a Belgian government social security body where data errors affect statutory benefit payments and regulatory compliance, placing this firmly in the high-risk category.
evidence.collaboration_width: Not stated — no distinctly named partner teams beyond the role's own Information Delivery Services team.
evidence.data_team_maturity: ICT department employs over 300 professionals across three dynamic teams
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: A 300+ person ICT department with named sub-teams (Information Delivery Services) and tools embedded in responsibilities (dbt, Dagster, Power BI) signals a mature, established data function.
evidence.jd_authorship: Developing stratified transformation logic with dbt, focused on maintainability, performance and profitability; Implementing data orchestration via Dagster for reliable delivery; Designing dimensional data models following Kimball methodology
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Named tools with precise application context (dbt for transformation logic, Dagster for orchestration, Kimball for dimensional modelling) make the day-to-day legible — the decisive phrase is 'stratified transformation logic with dbt, focused on maintainability, performance and profitability'.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role sits within 'Information Delivery Services', optimising Power BI models and building dimensional models for data consumers — primary orientation is the internal data platform and reporting layer.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Despite the 'autonomous' framing in requirements, all responsibility verbs are execution-oriented ('developing', 'implementing', 'designing', 'optimizing') within a large established team, with no strategic direction-setting language.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Optimizing reporting models and Power BI queries; maintaining code through CI/CD pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Dominant verbs are 'optimizing' and 'maintaining' within an established platform, indicating fix_scale rather than greenfield build.
evidence.language_gate: Dutch and English language knowledge (listed under Required Qualifications)

ai_role_reasoning: Traditional data engineering stack with no AI coding tools, AI infrastructure, or generative AI mentioned.
testing_framing_reasoning: CI/CD named in responsibilities but framed as maintenance execution, not ownership of quality practice.
loss_aversion_framing_quote: data errors affect statutory benefit payments and regulatory compliance
loss_aversion_framing_reasoning: Regulatory and compliance impact on statutory social security benefits dominates risk framing.
